steps.title: Choose the right pronoun
steps.content: The sentence after "However" needs a subject and verb for "______ the most recognition for voice acting." The subject must refer to Andre Blake, the singular person discussed throughout the passage.

steps.title: Match singular reference
steps.content: Choice A uses "those," Choice B uses "both," and Choice D uses "they all." All three are plural and lack a clear plural antecedent in a passage about one actor. The singular pronoun and verb correctly refer back to Blake. The answer is C.
